title: Rhabdophyllum leptoneurum
taxonomy: Rhabdophyllum leptoneurum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the genus Rhabdophyllum, which is endemic to Madagascar. The species is classified as an evergreen tree with small, yellow flowers. Rhabdophyllum leptoneurum is closely related to other species within the Sapindaceae family, including the Rhus and Cardiospermum genera. Further classification of Rhabdophyllum leptoneurum into a more specific rank, such as family or order, is necessary for a complete understanding of its classification.
